settings.heading: Crafted for the Bold
settings.body: At Tokiyo Lifestyle, we believe fashion is more than clothing — it's a statement. Every piece is designed with precision and crafted from premium materials for the modern individual.
settings.features: Premium Quality Fabrics|Ethically Sourced Materials|Designed in India|Free Shipping on ₹2999+

settings.author: Arjun M.
settings.text: The oversized tee is hands down the best I've owned. Premium cotton, perfect drape, and the packaging was elite. Tokiyo gets it!

settings.author: Priya S.
settings.text: Obsessed with the cargo pants! The quality is unreal for the price. Already ordered two more pieces. Definitely my new go-to brand.

settings.author: Rahul K.
settings.text: Fast shipping, beautiful packaging, and the hoodie fits like a dream. This brand is going places. Highly recommend!
